underweight: You're so skinny, you could hula hoop with a Cheerio!
You're so skinny, you get mistaken for a selfie stick.
You're so skinny, you can hang glide on a Dorito.
You're so skinny, your pajamas have only one stripe.
You're so skinny, even paper cuts are jealous.
You're so skinny, your reflection has more weight than you.
You're so skinny, you could slip under the door like an envelope.
You're so skinny, you don't get a tan; you just get 'highlighted.'
normal: My wife told me to stop impersonating a flamingo. I had to put my foot down.
I went to buy some camo pants but couldn't find any.
I failed math so many times at school, I can't even count.
I used to have a handle on life, but then it broke.
I was wondering why the frisbee kept getting bigger and bigger, but then it hit me.
Most people are shocked when they find out how bad I am as an electrician.
Never trust atoms; they make up everything.
My wife just found out I replaced our bed with a trampoline. She hit the ceiling!
overweight_obese: You're so fat, when you go to an 'All You Can Eat' buffet, other customers go missing.
You're so fat, the last time you fell the dinosaurs went extinct.
You're so fat, Pluto is too small to be classified as a planet, but your anus is more than large enough.
You're so fat when you want to iron your pants you have to go out to your driveway
You're so fat that Ed Sheeran had a stroke trying to describe the shape of you
You're so fat the only letters you know are K,F and C
You're so fat you made one direction go another direction
You're so overweight that you could socially distance from yourself during the COVID-19 pandemic.
They say round is a shape, so I'm in excellent shape!
I'm not on a diet; I'm on a 'see food, eat food' plan.
Why do people call me a big deal? Because I'm too large to ignore!
Why don't fat people do yoga? Because touching their toes is just a stretch too far.
My fridge and I have a special relationship. It keeps things cool, and I keep things moving.
I'm not fat; I'm just well-insulated for winter!
Calories? I like to think of them as happiness points!
Why do I avoid the gym? Because the fridge is closer.
I'm not lazy; I'm just energy-efficient!
